# methods for payments
module SubmissionPaymentProcessor
  extend ActiveSupport::Concern
  include OpenNodeProcessor::Capture
  include OpenNodeProcessor::Reconcile
  include KountApproval
  include SubfiPayProcessor

  AlreadyCapturedError = Class.new(StandardError)
  InvalidPaymentType = Class.new(StandardError)
  NoAuthorizationTransaction = Class.new(StandardError)
  NonProcessingResponse = Struct.new(:success?, :processing?, :response)

  # Worldpay AVS response code settings
  # http://support.worldpay.com/support/CNP-API/content/avsrespcodes.htm
  AVS_CODE_DENYLIST = ENV.fetch("AVS_CODE_DENYLIST", "20,30,32").split(",")
  AVS_IGNORE_THRESHOLD = ENV.fetch("AVS_IGNORE_THRESHOLD", 1000).to_i # $10
  AVS_COUNTRIES = ENV.fetch("AVS_COUNTRIES", "US,CA,GB").split(",")

  CVV_CODE_DENYLIST = ENV.fetch("CVV_CODE_DENYLIST", "N,P,S,U").split(",")
  CVV_IGNORE_THRESHOLD = ENV.fetch("CVV_IGNORE_THRESHOLD", 1000).to_i # $10

  def auth!
    # TODO: only allow credit card auths
    fail InvalidPaymentType unless payment_method.type_of == "credit_card"

    fail Anedot::Exceptions::PaymentCaptureError if use_kount? && !kount_approved?

    auth_response_handler do
      payment_method.card_code = submission_payment_method.card_code

      Anedot::Payment::Adapter.auth_submission(self).tap do |txn|
        payment_method.update(cvv_match_code: txn.response.dig("cvv_result", "code"))
      end
    end
  end

  # capture_auth! so it doesn't collide with donation.capture!
  def capture_auth!
    fail AlreadyCapturedError if captured? || auth_captured?
    fail NoAuthorizationTransaction if payment_requests.successful_authorize.none?

    payment_response_handler do
      Anedot::Payment::Adapter.capture_submission(self)
    end
  end

  # TODO: DEPRECATED
  def purchase!
    case submission_payment_method.type_of
    when "applepay"
      purchase_with_applepay!
    when "credit_card"
      purchase_with_card!
    when "paypal"
      purchase_with_paypal!
    when "bitcoin_open_node"
      bitcoin_open_node_capture!
    when *Donation::OTHER_SOURCE_TYPES
      purchase_non_processing_type!
    else
      purchase_with_defaults!
    end
  end

  # When retrying a failure in post-capture
  def manual_capture!
    payment_response_handler do
      payment_requests.successful_authorize.first ||
        payment_requests.successful_purchase.first ||
        payment_requests.build(
          action: "purchase",
          amount: total_amount_processed,
          response_message: "Manually created to match gateway",
          response: {},
          success: true
        )
    end
  end

private

  # TODO: DEPRECATED
  def purchase_non_processing_type!
    payment_response_handler do
      NonProcessingResponse.new(true, false, {})
    end
  end

  def purchase_with_applepay!
    processing_type = "initialRecurring" if schedule.present?
    opts = { processing_type: }

    payment_response_handler do
      Anedot::Payment::Adapter.purchase_submission(self, opts)
    end
  end

  # TODO: DEPRECATED
  def purchase_with_card!
    payment_response_handler do
      payment_method.card_code = submission_payment_method.card_code

      Anedot::Payment::Adapter.purchase_submission(self).tap do |txn|
        payment_method.update(cvv_match_code: txn.response.dig("cvv_result", "code"))
      end
    end
  end

  # TODO: DEPRECATED
  def purchase_with_paypal!
    payment_response_handler do
      ::Paypal::Authorize.(
        total_amount_processed,
        payment_method,
        submission_payment_method.paypal_merchant_id,
        description: account.display_name,
        invoice_number: id,
        request_class: SubmissionRequest,
        payment_descriptor: account.credit_card_descriptor
      )
    end
  end

  def purchase_with_defaults!
    payment_response_handler do
      Anedot::Payment::Adapter.purchase_submission(self)
    end
  end

  def avs_approved?(txn)
    avs_code = txn.response["fraudResult_avsResult"]
    return true unless country.in?(AVS_COUNTRIES)
    return true if avs_code.blank?
    return true unless submission_payment_method.type_of == "credit_card"
    return true if txn.amount > AVS_IGNORE_THRESHOLD

    !avs_code.in?(AVS_CODE_DENYLIST)
  end

  def cvv_approved?(txn)
    cvv_code = txn.response.dig("cvv_result", "code")
    return true if account.disable_cvv?
    return true unless account.check_cvv_on_auth?
    return true if cvv_code.blank?
    return true unless submission_payment_method.type_of == "credit_card"
    return true if txn.amount > CVV_IGNORE_THRESHOLD

    !cvv_code.in?(CVV_CODE_DENYLIST)
  end

  def validate_approvals(txn)
    unless avs_approved?(txn)
      fail Anedot::Exceptions::AVSDeclineError,
           Vantiv::GetFriendlyMessage::SYSTEM_ERROR_MESSAGE
    end

    return if cvv_approved?(txn)

    fail Anedot::Exceptions::CVVDeclineError,
         Vantiv::GetFriendlyMessage::SYSTEM_ERROR_MESSAGE
  end

  def auth_response_handler
    txn = yield

    if txn.processing?
      txn.ip_address = ip_address.to_s
      txn.source_ip_address = ip_address.to_s
      txn.submission_id = id
      txn.save!
    end

    KountService.update_order(kount_data, txn) if use_kount?

    fail Anedot::Exceptions::PaymentCaptureError, vantiv_msg(txn) unless txn.success?

    txn
  rescue => e
    Anedot::ExceptionLogger.warn(e)

    record_payment_request(e)

    fail Anedot::Exceptions::PaymentCaptureError, e
  end

  def void_response_handler
    txn = yield
    return unless txn.processing?

    txn.ip_address = ip_address.to_s
    txn.source_ip_address = ip_address.to_s
    txn.submission_id = id
    txn.save!

    # TODO: handle void failure, schedule worker for retry?
  rescue => e
    Anedot::ExceptionLogger.warn(e)

    validate :amount_covers_ticket_costs, on: :create
    validate :ticket_quantity, on: :create

    before_create :set_promo_code_breakdown
    after_create :set_amounts

    after_update_commit :save_invoice

    # TODO: cleanup - currently used for donation API parity
    def middle_initial = middle_name.blank? ? nil : middle_name.first.upcase
    # TODO: cleanup - currently used for donation API parity
    def source = payment_method&.vault_type || submission_payment_method.type_of

    # TODO: cleanup - currently used for donation API parity
    def custom_fields_json
      custom_field_responses
        .where.not(data: nil)
        .each_with_object({}).with_index do |(response, json), index|
          # fields can have duplicate labels
          label = json.key?(response.label) ? "#{response.label} #{index}" : response.label
          json[label] = response.data
        end
    end

    def save_and_purchase!
      save!

      if amount_allocations.any?
        if payment_intent.present?
          process_payment_intent
        elsif capture_at.blank?
          purchase!
        else
          future_date = capture_at.in_time_zone(action_page.account.time_zone)

          FuturePurchaseWorker.perform_at(future_date, id)
        end
      else
        relay_to_active_wrapper_integrations
        fire_webhooks
        fire_integrations
        send_donation_receipt_email!
      end

      self
    rescue Anedot::Exceptions::CreatePaymentMethodError,
           Anedot::Exceptions::PaymentCaptureError => e

      tap { |s| s.errors.add(:base, message: e.message) }
    rescue ActiveRecord::RecordInvalid
      self
    end

    def send_donation_receipt_email!
      SubmissionMailer.donation_receipt(id).deliver_later

      event_tickets.each_with_object([]) do |et, emails|
        unless et.email.in?(emails) || et.email == email
          et.send_attendee_email!
          emails << et.email
        end
      end
    end

    def send_capture_failure_email!
      SubmissionMailer.capture_failure(id).deliver_later
    end

    def send_admin_donation_receipt_email!
      SubmissionMailer.donation_admin_receipt(id).deliver_later
    end

    def send_future_purchase_reminder!
      SubmissionMailer.future_purchase_reminder(id).deliver_later
    end

    def total_ticket_costs
      original_ticket_costs - promo_code_savings
    end

  private

    def event
      @event ||= event_tickets&.first&.ticket_type&.event
    end

    def amount_covers_ticket_costs
      return if from_vt
      return if total_ticket_costs.zero?

      donated_amount = amount_allocations.sum(&:amount)
      return if donated_amount == total_ticket_costs

      if donated_amount > total_ticket_costs
        return if allow_general_donations?

        errors.add(:base, message: "Donated amount exceeds ticket costs.")
      else
        errors.add(:base, message: "Ticket costs exceed submitted amount.")
      end
    end

    def original_ticket_costs
      event_tickets.sum { |ticket| ticket.ticket_type.price }
    end

    def promo_code_savings
      return 0 if promo_code.blank?

      promo_code.calculate_discount(original_ticket_costs)
    end

    def set_promo_code_breakdown
      return if promo_code.blank?

      self.promo_code_breakdown = {
        code: promo_code.code,
        discount_type: promo_code.discount_type,
        discount: promo_code.discount,
        original_ticket_costs:,
        promo_code_savings:
      }
    end

    def amount_within_range
      return if total_ticket_costs.zero? &&
                amount_allocations.sum(&:amount).zero? &&
                (!event.require_donation_for_free_tickets? || free_from_promo?)

      super
    end

    def free_from_promo?
      return false if promo_code_savings.zero?

      promo_code_savings == original_ticket_costs
    end

    def allow_general_donations?
      action_page.general_configuration.accepts_donations_for_all_purchase_types?
    end

    def ticket_quantity
      return if from_vt

      # event tickets not persisted yet
      counts = event_tickets.each_with_object({}) do |et, acc|
        acc[et.ticket_type_id] ||= 0
        acc[et.ticket_type_id] += 1
      end

      counts.each do |tt_id, ticket_qty|
        tt = TicketType.find(tt_id)
        next if tt.max_quantity.blank?

        if ticket_qty > tt.max_quantity
          errors.add(:event_tickets,
                     message: "Only #{tt.max_quantity} ticket(s) may be purchased at a time.")
        end
      end
    end
  end
end

module SubmissionPurchase
  extend ActiveSupport::Concern
  include SubmissionPaymentProcessor

private

  def amount_within_range
    min = action_page.amount_configuration.transaction_minimum
    max = action_page.amount_configuration.transaction_maximum

    total_amount_processed = if customer_covered_fees?
                               amount_allocations.reduce(0) do |tam, a|
                                 tam += DonorAmountWithFee.(
                                   amount: a.amount,
                                   rate: base_rate,
                                   txn_fee: (base_txn_fee / amount_allocations.size.to_f).ceil
                                 )

                                 tam
                               end
                             else
                               amount_allocations.sum(&:amount)
                             end

    return true if (min..max).include?(total_amount_processed)

    errors.add(
      :base,
      message: "Account requires amount to be #{Money.new(min).format}-#{Money.new(max).format}"
    )
  end

  def associate_rumble_up_request
    req = Notifications::RumbleUpRequest.associable.find_by(id: rumble_up_request_id)
    return if req.blank? || donations.blank?

    req.update(submission_id: id)
    donations.update_all(origin: "rumble_up")
  end

  def base_rate
    action_page.total_base_rate(
      vault_type: submission_payment_method.vault_type,
      network_type: submission_payment_method.network_type
    )
  end

  def base_txn_fee
    active_anedot_ba
      .send("#{submission_payment_method.vault_type}_transaction_fees")
      .send(submission_payment_method.network_type)
  end

  def intl_markup_rate
    return 0 if address&.country.in? ["US", nil]

    active_anedot_ba
      .send("#{submission_payment_method.vault_type}_international_markup_rates")
      .send(submission_payment_method.network_type)
  end

  def total_rate
    base_rate + intl_markup_rate
  end

  def active_anedot_ba
    @active_anedot_ba ||=
      action_page.active_billing_agreements.find_by!(recipient: Account.anedot_master_account)
  end

  def set_amounts
    total_amount = amount_allocations.sum(:amount)

    total_amount_processed = if customer_covered_fees?
                               amount_allocations.reduce(0) do |tam, a|
                                 tam += amount_processed = DonorAmountWithFee.(
                                   amount: a.amount,
                                   rate: total_rate,
                                   txn_fee: (base_txn_fee / amount_allocations.size.to_f).ceil
                                 )

                                 a.update(amount_processed:)

                                 tam
                               end
                             else
                               total_amount
                             end

    update(total_amount:, total_amount_processed:)
  end
end

# method for wrapping incoming json params
module ParamsWrapper
  extend ActiveSupport::Concern

  # creates wrapper from controller class, exposing on class/instance
  module Helper
    def params_wrapper
      scope = is_a?(Class) ? self : self.class
      scope.name.split("::").last.remove("Controller").underscore
    end
  end

  included { include Helper }
  class_methods { include Helper }
end
